start.text: You wake up in a mysterious land with no memory of how you got there.

explore_area.text: As you explore, you encounter a Wild Wolf.

battle.message: A wild Wolf growls at you, preparing to attack!

wolf_defeated.text: You have defeated the Wolf and feel a sense of accomplishment.

choices.text: Press 'G' or click 'Next' to continue your journey.

end.text: Your journey continues beyond this point. Thank you for playing!
